sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70441" key="neo/frwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νεό-φρων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">φρήν</etym>) <sense id="n70441.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">childish in spirit,</tr_> dub.l. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1557.tlg001:12:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Panyas.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.11</biblScope> </bibl> (leg. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐνεό-</foreign>): freq. as pr. n.</sense> </entryFree>
